name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
#Envelope#
#Black Silver Buckle#
Small Grained Embossed Quilted Leather Envelope Bag
Classic is eternal, stunning V pattern mixed with rhombus and caviar texture, Italian ZP original cowhide paired with a bold YSL logo, combining elegance and fashion!

Size: 21x13x6cm
